name: @yakcc-bench/b4-tokens-v3
description: B4-v3 — Two-phase hypothesis-matrix: Opus corpus-build + 6-cell exploit (A-F) across 5 complex tasks.
notes: NOT in the pnpm workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml only includes packages/* and examples/*).
@anthropic-ai/sdk is bench-local — must NOT appear in root package.json.
Oracle tests run against reference-impl.ts by default (no API key needed).
Phase 1 + Phase 2 harness runs require ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and consume real API budget ($75 cap).
